name: Concurrency, Races & Synchronization
description: 并发编程:竞态、锁、异步与死锁排查

detector.inline: profile.code_domains.some(d=>['concurrency','races','locks','async','deadlock'].includes(d)) || profile.repo_signals.some(s=>/\b(race condition|data race|deadlock|mutex|lock ordering|async cancellation|memory ordering|atomic operation|thread safety)\b/i.test(s)) ? 0.9 : 0
